case_title: HENDERSON BOLDEN VS. LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BOLDEN, HENDERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA C/O HSM MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, HENDERSON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA C/O HSM MANAGEMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, HENDERSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA C/O HSM MANAGEMENT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA C/O HSM MANAGEMENT HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA C/O HSM MANAGEMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA IS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, HENDERSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA C/O HSM MANAGEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LA SALLE HEIGHTS HOA C/O HSM MANAGEMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, HENDERSON
